Uses of Class
neqsim.process.research.ProcessCandidate

Packages that use ProcessCandidate
Package
Description
neqsim.process.research
Process synthesis and candidate-ranking utilities for process research workflows.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    ProcessCandidateEvaluator.addBestPointObjectives(ProcessCandidate candidate, ProcessResearchSpec spec, double[] bestPoint)
    Adds best-point decision variable values to candidate objectives.
    void
    ProcessResearchResult.addCandidate(ProcessCandidate candidate)
    Adds a candidate.
    private void
    ProcessCandidateEvaluator.addHeatIntegrationMetrics(ProcessSystem process, ProcessCandidate candidate, ProcessResearchSpec spec, ProcessResearchMetrics metrics, boolean recordWarnings)
    Adds pinch-analysis metrics when requested.
    private void
    ProcessCandidateGenerator.addTerminalProductReferences(ProcessCandidate candidate, String unitName, OperationOption option)
    Adds product stream references based on the final equipment type in a generated path.
    private ProcessResearchMetrics
    ProcessCandidateEvaluator.collectProcessMetrics(ProcessSystem process, ProcessCandidate candidate, ProcessResearchSpec spec, boolean recordWarnings)
    Collects process-wide energy, heat-integration, cost, emissions, and complexity metrics.
    private boolean
    ProcessResearcher.dominates(ProcessCandidate left, ProcessCandidate right)
    Checks whether one candidate dominates another.
    void
    ProcessCandidateEvaluator.evaluate(ProcessCandidate candidate, ProcessResearchSpec spec)
    Evaluates a candidate and updates it in place.
    private double
    ProcessCandidateEvaluator.evaluateRobustness(ProcessCandidate candidate, ProcessResearchSpec spec, double baseScore)
    Evaluates optional feed-condition robustness scenarios.
    private double
    ProcessResearcher.metricValue(ProcessCandidate candidate, String metricName)
    Gets a minimization metric value, treating absent values as zero burden.
    private void
    ProcessCandidateEvaluator.optimizeWithGrid(ProcessCandidate candidate, ProcessSystem process, ProcessResearchSpec spec)
    Runs a bounded grid search for the candidate decision variables.
    private void
    ProcessCandidateEvaluator.recordMetrics(ProcessCandidate candidate, ProcessResearchMetrics metrics)
    Records structured metrics on a candidate.
    private String
    ProcessCandidateEvaluator.resolveTargetReference(ProcessCandidate candidate, ProcessResearchSpec.ProductTarget target)
    Resolves the stream reference used for a product target.
    private double
    ProcessCandidateEvaluator.scoreProcess(ProcessSystem process, ProcessCandidate candidate, ProcessResearchSpec spec, boolean recordMetrics)
    Scores a process against the product targets.
    private double
    ProcessResearcher.utilityValue(ProcessCandidate candidate, String primaryMetric, String fallbackMetric)
    Gets a utility metric value with a fallback raw duty metric.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    ProcessCandidateGenerator.addCompressionCandidate(ProcessResearchSpec spec, List<ProcessCandidate> candidates)
    Adds a gas-compression candidate when applicable.
    private void
    ProcessCandidateGenerator.addPhaseSeparationCandidate(ProcessResearchSpec spec, List<ProcessCandidate> candidates)
    Adds the default phase-separation candidate when applicable.
    private void
    ProcessCandidateGenerator.addReactionCandidates(ProcessResearchSpec spec, List<ProcessCandidate> candidates)
    Adds reactor-containing candidates from reaction options.
